title: Senior Software Engineer Python Django PostgreSQL and Vue.js

summary.lv: Senior programmatūras inženieris uzņēmumā GHX, veidojot full-stack lietotnes ar Python/Django/PostgreSQL/Vue.js AWS orientētā SaaS vidē.
summary.en: Senior Software Engineer at GHX, building full-stack apps with Python/Django/PostgreSQL/Vue.js in an AWS-centric SaaS environment.
